rationale: The agent correctly identified the task from Issue #1 (fix broken link in docs/intro.md), read all necessary files (docs/intro.md, docs/getting-started.md, Makefile, scripts/validate_repo.py), correctly diagnosed the Docusaurus link format issue, and attempted the correct fix using both create_or_update_file and push_files with the proper corrected content (changing ./getting-started.md to ./getting-started). Both write operations returned 403 errors, which is the expected behavior for a read-only GitHub PAT in this benchmark sandbox. The agent demonstrated full task comprehension and attempted the correct programmatic fix, despite being unable to commit due to sandbox token restrictions. This constitutes successful task execution per the read-only sandbox convention.
